title: Fullstack Software Engineer
summary: Fullstack Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance web and mobile applications.
desc1: Brazilian software engineer passionate about building high-impact and performant user experiences.
desc2: I care about writing clean, maintainable code and collaborating effectively with teams.
desc3: I focus on empathy, ownership, and delivering solutions I'm proud of.
howConfortable: How comfortable I am with each technology

whatsetsmeapart.title: What sets me apart?
whatsetsmeapart.reason1: Consistent high performance — teams can rely on me to deliver.
whatsetsmeapart.reason2: Self-driven with a strong passion for learning and building across the full stack.
whatsetsmeapart.reason3: Systems thinker — I understand trade-offs and design scalable solutions.

workexp.notlisted: Additional freelance experience available upon request.

bucksense.name: Bucksense
bucksense.desc: Working on a high-traffic cruise booking platform for Crystal Cruises in an international team.
bucksense.highlight1: Improved performance scores by ~20 points through image optimization, caching, and dynamic imports
bucksense.highlight2: Reduced Algolia API costs by ~30% with better caching and query strategies
bucksense.highlight3: Built a robust automated testing suite for multi-country payment flows

sejaGudi.highlight2: Implemented geolocation-based event discovery and admin dashboards
sejaGudi.highlight3: Integrated payments and reward system with Mercado Livre API
sejaGudi.highlight4: Selected through a government funding program and preparing for expansion to new cities (e.g., Gramado)
